programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Historical Charm With a Bold New Look in Galveston
programme.desc: A single mom from Houston who restores rundown homes is looking for her next project in Galveston, Texas; with the help of her father and the rest of her team, she hopes to find a house that's not only affordable, but that's also near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Family Flip in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: Two brothers and their mother team up to find a rundown beach house they can renovate and sell along the coast of Gulf Shores, Ala.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Philly Couple Renos a South Jersey Shore Vacation Home
programme.desc: A Philadelphia couple who both grew up spending their summers at the Jersey shore are looking to buy a beach house. They plan to put in a lot of sweat equity to keep the budget low and create a dream getaway for their growing family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Historical Charm With a Bold New Look in Galveston
programme.desc: A single mom from Houston who restores rundown homes is looking for her next project in Galveston, Texas; with the help of her father and the rest of her team, she hopes to find a house that's not only affordable, but that's also near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Family Flip in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: Two brothers and their mother team up to find a rundown beach house they can renovate and sell along the coast of Gulf Shores, Ala.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Philly Couple Renos a South Jersey Shore Vacation Home
programme.desc: A Philadelphia couple who both grew up spending their summers at the Jersey shore are looking to buy a beach house. They plan to put in a lot of sweat equity to keep the budget low and create a dream getaway for their growing family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Cutting Costs on the New Jersey Coast
programme.desc: A New Jersey family sets their sights on Ocean County, where canal homes allow residents to enjoy the ocean and the bays created by a barrier island; after years of visiting family and friends, buying a home will give them a place to call their own.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate, so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job; after settling on a cabin from an old project, the crew rebuilds the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame; they use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Second Chance Stage
programme.desc: A second group sings, performs stand up, plays saxophone and step dances to compete for the chance to advance to the finale.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders access the beautiful backlot of the Boneyard facing a state park to create a picture perfect cabin; working with custom notched inventory, the guys design a two-story log cabin ahead of their client's arrival.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Buidlers find a home that's half log cabin and a half timberframe in Lowell, Ohio; as they work to save this structure they find a home filled with treasures.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys complete Barnwood Village with a modular unit that needs their rustic touch; the guys reflect on their long journey together traveling the country, saving history and making friends.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: A Changing of the Guard's Camp
programme.desc: For the first time in Cabin Masters history, a structure is so bad that they have to tear it down to the foundation and start from scratch; the team must stay on task and ultimately recreate the cabin that the owners have dreamed of for their family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Peace, Love and a Fallen Pine Tree
programme.desc: A winter storm and a fallen tree jeopardize to destroy a family's Bear Pond property; Chase and the Cabin Masters come to the rescue, preserving the camp's oddities and adding space for the soon-arriving next generation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: A Cabin for the Whole Family
programme.desc: It is a great opportunity for Chase and the team to rebuild and ultimately repair a cabin for a man and his family, but they will have to act quickly so they can finish before winter arrives so that the family can enjoy it for years to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their boathouse-turned-cabin into a summer retreat; with the camp located directly on the water, the Cabin Masters will have to figure out how to reinforce it, address uneven walls and create more space for this family of four.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Greg and Denise purchase a cabin on the shore of Messalonskee Lake; this is one of the largest budgets the crew has ever had to work with, so the team works hard to help the couple transform this picturesque diamond in the rough into a polished gem.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters are summoned to the medieval role-playing community of Burgundar to repair their market, fire pit, and gathering inn; a ferocious rainstorm and winter weather threaten to thwart the team's grand plans for the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters restore a generational camp as the family honors their 92-year-old matriarch. They update the cabin with fresh spaces and heartfelt touches, racing to ready it for future generations while preserving its family legacy and history.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man enlists the team to make his tiny cabin on the water more comfortable; he wants to restore a vintage sink and honor his late friend, who was an electrician; when a storm threatens the build at the end, the crew must find a way to finish safely.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Meet the Cannons -- they need a new roof, additional sleeping space and, most importantly, higher ceilings; the Cabin Masters transport a very heavy stone hearth, Jedi and Ashley race to assemble a set of stools, and the guys prank Ashley.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" head to the hills to help the snow-happy Richardson family fulfill their dream of owning a slope side abode at the Black Mountain Ski Resort; the crew must overcome the difficulties of construction in a flood plain.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After a massive storm in central Maine, the Cabin Masters return to two former renovations to help out. Multiple trees destroyed cabins and porches around the YMCA camp property while the Chadwick family's screened-in porch was crushed by a tree.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After a tree falls onto the roof of a family camp, the mishap is chosen as an opportunity; the "Maine Cabin Masters" are called in to facilitate an expansion.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Pop of Color at Popham Beach
programme.desc: The Triangle House has been a staple in Phippsburg since the 20s; a local artist, who's admired the cottage since childhood, bought it in the 80s; after more than a century of wear, she invites the Maine Cabin Masters to save the local landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" help out old family friends whose house suffered fire damage; the crew faces the challenge of working on the residence, while Ashley makes a scrapbook and a one-of-a-kind bench to honor old memories.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After a tree falls onto the roof of a family camp, the mishap is chosen as an opportunity; the "Maine Cabin Masters" are called in to facilitate an expansion.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Pop of Color at Popham Beach
programme.desc: The Triangle House has been a staple in Phippsburg since the 20s; a local artist, who's admired the cottage since childhood, bought it in the 80s; after more than a century of wear, she invites the Maine Cabin Masters to save the local landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" help out old family friends whose house suffered fire damage; the crew faces the challenge of working on the residence, while Ashley makes a scrapbook and a one-of-a-kind bench to honor old memories.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After a massive storm in central Maine, the Cabin Masters return to two former renovations to help out. Multiple trees destroyed cabins and porches around the YMCA camp property while the Chadwick family's screened-in porch was crushed by a tree.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Out of the Ashes: Rebuilding in Gatlinburg, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Gatlinburg, Tenn., to replace a log home lost in the 2016 wildfires; they bring with them the Beam Cabin, but it's no easy feat to move these massive logs up a narrow mountain pass; designer Karen Tillery works with Mark.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown In Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: In Ohio, Mark and the guys attempt to save a giant double pen barn, but high winds turn this complicated job into a treacherous one.

programme.title: Second Chance Stage
programme.desc: A grocer, client specialist, rancher, financial planner and teacher take the stage for their chance to achieve their long-delayed dreams.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: A Connecticut couple renovates and expands a beloved little cabin in Weston to provide the space to spend more time with friends and family.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: A designer and her fiancé rescue a run-down 1899 Folk Victorian from demolition, moving it from the busy streets of Austin, Texas to farmland in nearby Georgetown where they restore it into their own little house on the prairie.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.desc: Mandi and Court Gubler turn an adobe building into their Utah dream home.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take a tour with clients Clint and Kelly Harp through the Brook Oaks neighborhood; the Harps look for a house with an urban feel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple wants a home in the Viking Hills neighborhood, but current residents seem hesitant to ever leave.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: The impending arrival of their baby determines the deadline for the renovation of a couple's ranch style house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Touring three homes in Woodway, Texas, to find a move-in ready place in the city's reputable school district.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple tours three houses in Waco, Texas, and although their wishlist is small, so is their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Vacation Renovation in Ocean Park Washington
programme.desc: A couple living in Seattle searches for a vacation getaway along the sands of Ocean Park, Wash, and waterfront homes in this Pacific coast community aren't cheap, so finding a deal could require some renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Biloxi Beach House Renovation for Vacation
programme.desc: A Dallas couple is looking for a vacation home that's only a short walk to the beaches of Biloxi, Miss.; they are on a budget and willing to put in the work to renovate a house into a place where they can eventually retire.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Beach Home Blowout Renovation on Pawleys Island, SC
programme.desc: A Carolina family finds a deal on their new beach house on Pawleys Island, S.C.; a massive overhaul of the floor plan and expansions on both floors guarantees room for their growing family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Making a Splash on the Brunswick Islands
programme.desc: A beach-loving family from Raleigh, N.C., looks for their own slice of waterfront heaven on the coast; after a lifetime of working hard, they finally get the chance to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Having split their time between Nashville, Tenn., and Destin, Fla., a couple hopes to get their sons out into the sunshine permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Tired of Denver cold, a family finds a place in Cocoa Beach, Fla., but they want to add a poolside oasis and custom spa.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Beaufort, North Carolina Beach House Remodel
programme.desc: Hoping to create memories, a couple from Durham is searching for a Beaufort, NC beach home to share with family and rent out. But with access to fishing, boating, and beautiful beaches driving up prices, their dream depends on finding an affordable fixer.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, Texas includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing.
